metadata.title: About Immonation

AboutPage.title: Real-estate advisory with local roots and digital reach.
AboutPage.lede: Immonation supports owners, buyers, and investors in Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, Erlangen, and the surrounding region with valuation, marketing, and personal advisory.
AboutPage.body: Our standard is a transparent process with defensible numbers, clear communication, and marketing that does more than place a standard listing.

metadata.title: Free property valuation
metadata.description: Free, non-binding property valuation for Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, Erlangen, and the surrounding region — well-founded, on site, with a written result.

hero.title: What is your property worth?
hero.lede: A well-founded valuation based on current sales data from your neighborhood — verified on site, documented in writing, and with no obligation.

ValuationPage.answer: The Immonation GmbH property valuation is free and non-binding. We determine the realistic market value of your property in Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, Erlangen, and the surrounding region — based on current transactions, our own brokered sales, and an on-site assessment, not an algorithm alone.

items.title: Current comparables
items.text: We value in the context of real sales from your area — not generic online calculators.

items.title: On-site assessment
items.text: Condition, fittings, and micro-location are personally verified and factored into the value.

items.title: Written result
items.text: You receive a documented assessment you can use for decisions, inheritance matters, or bank meetings.

items.title: No obligation
items.text: Whether you sell, hold, or seek a second opinion — the decision stays yours.

items.title: Share key details
items.text: Property type, location, and basic data — online in a few minutes or by phone.

items.title: Analysis & on-site visit
items.text: We review comparables and visit your property in person.

items.title: Result & recommendation
items.text: You receive the valuation in writing — with a clear recommendation for next steps.

items.question: What does the property valuation cost?
items.answer: For prospective sellers, the valuation is free and non-binding. Formal appraisals for inheritance or tax purposes are billed transparently by effort.

items.question: How long does the valuation take?
items.answer: From inquiry to written result typically takes a few days to two weeks, depending on scheduling and documents.

items.question: Which documents are needed?
items.answer: A floor plan, living-space calculation, energy certificate, and land-register extract help. Missing documents can be obtained together.

items.question: Am I obligated to anything after the valuation?
items.answer: No. The valuation is a basis for your decision — whether and when you sell is entirely up to you.

cta.title: Start your free valuation now
cta.text: Requested in 3 minutes — we respond within one business day with the next steps.

metadata.title: Frequently asked questions (FAQ)
metadata.description: Answers to the most common questions about selling, valuation, commission, timelines, and process at Immonation GmbH.

FaqPage.title: Common questions, clearly answered
FaqPage.lede: Costs, timelines, process, documents: the questions owners and buyers ask us most — answered in a few sentences.

items.question: What does the property valuation cost?
items.answer: The valuation is free and non-binding for prospective sellers — including an on-site assessment and a written result.

items.question: How long does a property sale take?
items.answer: Typically 6 to 12 weeks from marketing to the notary appointment — depending on the property, pricing strategy, and demand.

items.question: Who pays the broker commission?
items.answer: The commission is split between seller and buyer depending on the property and constellation. The exact rate is disclosed transparently in the exposé and before engagement.

items.question: Which documents do I need to sell?
items.answer: Land-register extract, floor plan, living-space calculation, energy certificate, and for apartments the declaration of division. We obtain missing documents together.

items.question: What does the 360° tour add?
items.answer: Prospects view digitally first — only serious buyers show up in person. That saves appointments and protects your privacy.

items.question: Which region does Immonation serve?
items.answer: We broker properties in Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, Erlangen, and within roughly 60 km of our office in Zirndorf.

items.question: Can I sell a property with an existing tenancy?
items.answer: Yes. We market properties with an existing tenancy specifically to investors — including preparation of the relevant contractual and yield data.

items.question: Does Immonation also help with financing?
items.answer: Yes. Together with our financing partner Dr. Klein, we verify buyers' financing and advise buyers on conditions.

cta.title: Didn't find your question?
cta.text: Call us or start with a free valuation — we respond within one business day.

metadata.title: Privacy policy
metadata.description: Privacy policy of Immonation GmbH: controller, data processing, cookies, consent, and your rights.

LegalPrivacy.title: Privacy policy
LegalPrivacy.lede: How we handle your data — transparent and to the point. The German version is authoritative.

sections.heading: Controller
paragraphs: The controller for data processing on this website is Immonation GmbH, Nürnberger Straße 18, 90513 Zirndorf, Germany, phone +49 911 212 838 90, email info@immonations.de.

sections.heading: Hosting
paragraphs: This website is hosted by an external service provider. Personal data collected on this website is stored on the host's servers. [Host and data-processing agreement to be added before launch]

sections.heading: Contact & forms
paragraphs: If you contact us via form, email, or phone, we process your details to handle the inquiry (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR). We use an email service provider for form delivery. [Resend details and DPA to be added before launch]

sections.heading: Cookies & consent
paragraphs: We only use technically non-essential cookies and tracking services (e.g., Google Analytics 4, Meta Pixel) with your explicit consent via the consent banner (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR). You can withdraw your consent at any time.

sections.heading: External content
paragraphs: YouTube videos load in privacy-enhanced mode and only after a click. Links to Google, Trustpilot, Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook lead to external providers with their own privacy policies.

sections.heading: Your rights
paragraphs: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and objection (Art. 15–21 GDPR). You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority, the Bavarian State Office for Data Protection Supervision.

LegalPrivacy.note: This privacy policy is a structured starting point and will be legally reviewed and completed before launch.

CareersPage.title: Working at Immonation
CareersPage.lede: Whether employed or as an independent sales partner: we are growing in the Nuremberg metropolitan region and looking for people who love real estate and sales.

sections.heading: Employees
paragraphs: We regularly fill positions in real estate and back office — from property onboarding and marketing to transaction preparation. Specific job postings will be published here shortly.

sections.heading: Independent sales partners
paragraphs: You focus on acquisition and sales — Immonation handles administration, branding, paperwork, and the complete marketing structure. With 20 percent commission and an experienced team behind you.
Ideal for sales-driven people from the region with real-estate experience or their own buying and selling experience.

metadata.title: Property sale process: 10 clear steps
metadata.description: How a property sale works with Immonation: ten clear steps from property intake and valuation to the notary appointment and key handover.

hero.title: The property sale process in 10 clear steps
hero.lede: A successful sale does not begin with a listing. It begins with complete information, a market-ready price, and a clear roadmap through to handover.

SalesProcess.answer: Our property sale process follows ten defined steps: we document the property and its records, assess market and price, agree the strategy, prepare the presentation, publish after your approval, and then manage enquiries, viewings, negotiation, the notary process, and handover.
SalesProcess.indexLabel: Jump to a step in the property sale process

owner.title: What you can expect throughout the sale

items.title: One clear roadmap
items.text: You know which step is complete, what happens next, and which decision we need from you.

items.title: Controlled approvals
items.text: We agree the price, strategy, brochure, and publication with you before your property enters the market.

items.title: One coordinating interface
items.text: We keep seller, buyer, finance partner, and notary aligned and remain involved through handover.

related.title: Choose the right next step for your situation
related.text: Begin with a well-founded valuation or read the property-specific guide for a house, apartment, plot, or apartment building.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about the property sale process

items.question: Which documents are needed to sell a property?
items.answer: The core records include the land register extract, site plan or cadastral map, energy certificate, and key property data and photos. Depending on the property type, floor plans, floor-area calculations, declarations of division, meeting minutes, tenancy records, or a development plan may also be needed. We source missing records through our specialist network, which can also prepare floor plans and area calculations when required.

items.question: When is the property published?
items.answer: Publication takes place only after property intake, valuation, sales strategy, and professional preparation are complete. The brochure, price, and marketing route are released to the relevant portals and agreed channels after your approval.

items.question: How are prospective buyers checked?
items.answer: We handle every enquiry, assess seriousness and creditworthiness, clarify financing, and then arrange suitable viewings. This focuses appointments on buyers who genuinely want and are able to purchase the property.

items.question: What happens after a purchase offer?
items.answer: We review the price and conditions, assess the buyer profile and financing, and negotiate in your interest. We then coordinate preparation of the purchase agreement, the notary office, and notarisation.

items.question: Does the agent's support end at the notary appointment?
items.answer: No. After notarisation, we organise the handover, document meter readings, and coordinate remaining points. Our support continues through the key handover and beyond.

cta.title: Start with a reliable first step
cta.text: In a personal conversation, we put your property's value, records, target group, and timetable into context.

steps.title: Instruction & property intake
steps.summary: We document your property completely and create a reliable basis for every decision that follows.
steps.detail: Once instructed, we take the time to build a complete picture. Property type, year of construction, condition, areas, plot data, features, modernisation work, and distinctive strengths are recorded together with the available documents.
activities: Record the property, areas, condition, and features systematically
Document distinctive strengths and modernisation work
Review available records and identify missing documents
steps.outcome: A complete evidence base prevents later surprises and makes the valuation and marketing defensible.

steps.title: Valuation & market analysis
steps.summary: We determine a market-ready asking price using experience, data, and current comparable listings.
steps.detail: The valuation rests on three pillars: our sales experience with comparable properties in the region, current market data and professional valuation tools, and comparison with similar properties currently offered on the market.
activities: Assess regional sales experience and property characteristics
Evaluate current market data and professional valuation tools
Compare competing listings and the property's realistic market position
steps.outcome: You receive a well-founded basis for an achievable sale price, not a wish price or a price chosen merely to win the instruction.

steps.title: Sales strategy
steps.summary: Together we define the asking price, target group, sales arguments, and marketing route.
steps.detail: The right price and message determine whether the first weeks of peak attention are used well. Before launch, we define which buyers fit the property, which strengths matter most, and which channels will reach them.
activities: Agree a market-ready asking price
Define suitable buyer groups and persuasive property strengths
Plan marketing channels and approval points
steps.outcome: A clear launch protects the most valuable attention phase and reduces the need for later price corrections.

steps.title: Professional preparation
steps.summary: Photography, floor plans, brochure, and digital presentation show the property from its strongest perspective.
steps.detail: We prepare a clear property description, high-quality photography, and polished floor plans. Depending on the property, a virtual tour or clearly labelled visualisations add context. Our specialist network can prepare missing lender-ready measured plans and floor-area calculations.
activities: Create the brochure, property description, and professional imagery
Review, improve, or measure floor plans when required
Use 360° tours, drone imagery, or visualisation where they add value
steps.outcome: Buyers understand the location, rooms, and potential online and arrive better prepared for the next stage.

steps.title: Publication
steps.summary: After your approval, we launch the property on the relevant portals and through the right channels.
steps.detail: The property enters the market only after the agreed approvals. We combine relevant property portals with our buyer network and, where appropriate, target-group social communication and additional visibility measures.
activities: Present the brochure and marketing materials for approval
Publish on the relevant property portals
Activate the buyer network and suitable additional channels
steps.outcome: Your property appears where suitable buyers search, with one consistent and approved presentation.

steps.title: Enquiry management
steps.summary: We handle every enquiry, assess seriousness and creditworthiness, and keep the process clear.
steps.detail: Quality comes before quantity. We answer incoming enquiries, pre-assess prospective buyers, review seriousness and financial readiness, and document feedback. Engagement with the virtual tour can also support the qualification process.
activities: Handle incoming enquiries completely and promptly
Pre-qualify seriousness, buyer fit, and creditworthiness
Document feedback and next actions systematically
steps.outcome: You face fewer unnecessary appointments and gain a clear view of the demand that genuinely matters.

steps.title: Viewings
steps.summary: We present your property to serious buyers and manage each appointment with clear preparation and follow-up.
steps.detail: Viewings are arranged with pre-qualified buyers and conducted professionally. We prepare for likely questions, explain the property's decisive strengths, and obtain structured feedback after each appointment.
activities: Coordinate suitable appointments with qualified buyers
Present the property and its sales arguments professionally
Gather feedback and re-qualify continuing interest
steps.outcome: Viewings become informed decision appointments rather than casual property tourism.

steps.title: Offer & negotiation
steps.summary: We check the buyer and financing, assess the overall package, and negotiate in your interest.
steps.detail: An offer is not judged only by the number on the page. We review price and conditions, buyer profile, creditworthiness, and financing, then negotiate with the goal of a strong and secure completion.
activities: Review the offer's price, conditions, and timing
Assess the buyer profile, creditworthiness, and financing
Lead negotiations and coordination in your interest
steps.outcome: You decide on a checked overall package instead of relying only on the highest non-binding figure.

steps.title: Notary & notarisation
steps.summary: We coordinate the purchase agreement, notary office, and all parties through to notarisation.
steps.detail: Once terms are agreed, we support preparation of the purchase agreement, coordinate open points with the notary office, and keep seller, buyer, and finance partner aligned through to the notarisation appointment.
activities: Bring together the information needed for the purchase agreement
Coordinate open points with the buyer and notary office
Support the organisation of the notarisation appointment
steps.outcome: Every party works from the same information toward an orderly contractual completion.

steps.title: Handover & completion
steps.summary: We support the key handover, document meter readings, and remain available for outstanding points.
steps.detail: The process does not end with the signature. We organise the handover, prepare or support the record, document meter readings, and coordinate the final outstanding points between the parties.
activities: Organise the handover appointment between seller and buyer
Document the record, keys, and meter readings
Coordinate final outstanding points through to completion
steps.outcome: The change of ownership ends in a clear and orderly way, with one contact through the final step.

Magazine.title: A look at our work, our principles, and real sale stories.
Magazine.text: Our magazine presents selected sales from the greater Nuremberg region and the stories behind them: how owners made decisions, how we market properties, and what good guidance looks like.

points.title: Completed projects
points.text: Concrete examples instead of claims: properties, starting points, and outcomes from the region.

points.title: Our principles
points.text: Realistic pricing, careful preparation, and marketing that qualifies buyers seriously.

points.title: Flip through online
points.text: Read the issue directly by click, arrow keys, or fullscreen view.

reader.label: Flip through the REVIER online magazine

PremiumMarketing.title: Premium marketing works as a system.
PremiumMarketing.lede: From a market-ready price and lender-ready documents to precise buyer outreach, ten connected services prepare your sale, create visibility, and guide it safely to completion.
PremiumMarketing.tabList: Services in the Immonation sales system
PremiumMarketing.videoLabel: Example of a digital property presentation by Immonation
PremiumMarketing.videoFallback: Your browser cannot play the presentation video.

services.title: Selling means managing the process, not merely listing.
services.text: Every sale follows a defined path, from the complete property intake to the handover of keys. Responsibilities, approvals, and next steps remain clear throughout.
services.highlight: A clear plan for every step.
bullets: A complete roadmap from instruction to handover
Clear responsibilities within the Immonation team
Regular, proactive updates on the sale
One dedicated contact for your decisions
services.result: Preparation, marketing, and completion work as one process. Your sale remains manageable, and no important step is left to chance.

services.title: A market-ready price instead of wishful thinking or bait pricing.
services.text: Experience from regional sales, current market data, and comparison with similar listings provide the shared foundation.
bullets: On-site assessment of location, condition, and features
Data-led market analysis as an objective cross-check
Comparison with similar listings and completed sales
Joint decision on price and marketing route
services.result: The asking price reaches the right search filters and uses the high-attention launch phase without losing potential through an unrealistic opening position.

proof.label: context for the greater Nuremberg area
price as the basis of strategy

services.title: A complete foundation prevents surprises later.
services.text: We record property type, areas, condition, features, improvements, and special characteristics, then review the available documents.
bullets: Complete capture of property and land data
Review of land register, cadastral map, and energy certificate
Checks tailored to the specific property type
Procurement of missing documents through our network
services.result: Valuation, brochure, and buyer checks rely on dependable information, so open questions do not surface only during finance or contract review.

services.title: Measured floor plans that support financing.
services.text: Missing or unusable plans can delay a buyer's financing. When needed, our specialist network coordinates a measured redraw with a traceable living-area calculation.
services.highlight: Usable for buyers, lenders, and valuers.
bullets: Measurements for all relevant walls and rooms
Living-area calculation under the applicable regulation
Traceable records for lenders and valuers
Coordinated through an established specialist network
services.result: Buyers can submit usable plans with their finance application, while questions about dimensions and areas are resolved early.

proof.label: exact dimensions instead of a sketch

services.title: Your property's strengths become visible in seconds.
services.text: Professional images show rooms, land, and location from perspectives suited to the property and its buyer audience.
services.highlight: A first impression grounded in real potential.
bullets: Professional interior and exterior photography
Architecture-led perspectives for the plot and its setting
Image selection aligned with the buyer audience
Authentic presentation without false promises
services.result: The listing communicates quality and orientation before a prospect reads the first paragraph or requests an appointment.

services.title: Serious prospects view the property digitally first.
services.text: After an enquiry, suitable prospects receive access to the virtual tour. They gain a realistic sense of the space without an immediate on-site appointment.
bullets: A realistic digital tour of the property
Controlled access following a specific enquiry
Review of access and viewing duration
On-site appointments with better-prepared buyers
services.result: Your privacy is protected, and viewing time is focused on people who are seriously considering the property.

proof.label: clearer spatial understanding before a visit

services.title: Room and use ideas make potential visible.
services.text: For empty, renovation-ready, or unrealised spaces, visualisations show how rooms could be used and designed, always clearly identified as representations.
services.highlight: Easy to imagine, honest about the current state.
bullets: Virtual home staging for empty rooms
Visualisation of possible room and use ideas
Before-and-after context with clear labelling
Targeted use only where explanation adds value
services.result: Prospects understand the potential faster while the property's actual condition remains transparent.

services.title: A precise brochure brings every fact together.
services.text: Property description, photography, floor plans, and documents form one consistent presentation. We publish only after your review and approval.
bullets: Compelling property and location description
Ordered facts, areas, and supporting documents
An approval round before publication
Placement on the relevant property portals
services.result: Buyers receive a dependable basis for their decision, and questions focus on what genuinely matters to the purchase.

services.title: Reach follows the audience, not a scattergun approach.
services.text: Portals, enhanced placements, social campaigns, and our buyer network are combined to fit the property, its audience, and the desired level of discretion.
services.highlight: Visible where suitable buyers are looking.
bullets: Audience-led campaigns on social media
Enhanced portal placements where useful
Direct outreach through our buyer network
Discreet buyer outreach with coordinated communication
services.result: The property receives the attention it needs without confusing broad reach with genuine demand.

proof.label: reach within the active search market

services.title: Not every enquiry automatically becomes a viewing.
services.text: We review seriousness, buyer fit, and financing, coordinate appointments, and guide qualified offers through negotiation, the notary process, and handover.
services.highlight: The best price matters only when the sale is secure.
bullets: Personal handling and pre-qualification of every enquiry
Review of creditworthiness and financing viability
Negotiation of price and terms in your interest
Coordination of contract, notary, and handover
services.result: Reach becomes dependable offers, and the strongest overall package becomes a securely coordinated completion.

proof.label: price and terms kept in view
through to the handover of keys

metadata.title: Sell a property | Immonation
metadata.description: Sell a house, apartment, land, or apartment building with sound valuation, clear strategy, and premium marketing in the Nuremberg region.

SellerHubPage.title: Sell a property — prepared, not merely listed.
SellerHubPage.lede: Every property type raises different questions about valuation, records, buyers, and marketing. Choose the appropriate sales path and learn what matters in practice.
SellerHubPage.answer: A strong property sale starts with a realistic valuation and a plan. Immonation coordinates preparation, presentation, buyer review, and completion with one dedicated contact across Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, and Erlangen.

local.title: Local context instead of a generic market figure.
local.text: Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, and Erlangen vary at district and street level. Our location pages explain the sales approach without unverified live prices.

cta.title: Which sales path fits your property?
cta.text: Start with a non-binding valuation or place your plans in context during a personal conversation.

SellerGuidePage.areaServed: Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, Erlangen, and surrounding areas

cta.title: Prepare your sale properly
cta.text: We clarify value, documents, buyer group, and timing before your property enters the market.

metadata.title: Real-estate agents in the Nuremberg region
metadata.description: Local property advice and sales in Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, and Erlangen — personal and property-specific.

LocationsPage.title: Local market knowledge starts with the neighborhood.
LocationsPage.lede: A city name alone does not explain property value. We consider micro-location, property type, condition, and current buyer group and turn them into a reliable sales strategy.
LocationsPage.answer: Immonation supports owners in Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, and Erlangen with personal valuation and professional marketing. These location pages provide durable orientation without invented or outdated price claims.

cta.title: How does your property fit its local market?
cta.text: An on-site valuation connects property characteristics with the specific micro-location and current demand.

cta.title: Value your property in {city}
cta.text: We connect the specific micro-location in {city} with condition, documents, and the current buyer group.

metadata.title: Become a real-estate agent | Immonation
metadata.description: Work with Immonation as a real-estate agent or independent sales partner in the Nuremberg metropolitan region: role, collaboration, and application.

RecruitingPage.title: Broker property — with structure behind you.
RecruitingPage.lede: You bring sales ability, regional proximity, and responsibility for clients. Immonation provides the brand, administration, documents, and a professional marketing structure.
RecruitingPage.answer: The agent partnership is for people who want to win owners, understand property, and lead sales personally. We discuss the framework, responsibilities, and compensation transparently during an introductory conversation.

items.title: Clear role
items.text: You focus on acquisition, owner advice, and the personal sales process.

items.title: Ordered documents
items.text: Administration, brand material, and marketing records are prepared in a structured team process.

items.title: Shared marketing
items.text: Photography, video, 360° presentation, and distribution work as one coordinated process.

items.title: Regional proximity
items.text: You work across the metropolitan region with an accessible team and short coordination routes.

profile.title: What fits Immonation
profile.text: How you work matters more than the number of entries on your CV. Property experience is useful; reliability and readiness to learn are essential.

items.title: Sales ability with judgment
items.text: You can lead conversations, listen, and prepare decisions without unnecessary pressure.

items.title: Independent organization
items.text: You keep commitments, document work clearly, and manage several sales processes responsibly.

items.title: Regional roots
items.text: You know the people, routes, and property in the region or actively build that network.

items.title: Digital openness
items.text: You use media and processes to improve advice, not to replace personal contact.

steps.title: How we get to know each other

items.title: Introduce yourself
items.text: Send us your background, region, and view of a good working relationship.

items.title: Align expectations
items.text: We discuss role, working style, support, compensation model, and realistic next steps.

items.title: Decide together
items.text: If values and expectations fit, we agree the concrete start and necessary foundations.

items.question: Do I need prior estate-agency experience?
items.answer: Property or sales experience is useful. Advisory ability, reliability, and willingness to learn the property and process thoroughly are decisive.

items.question: Is the role employed or self-employed?
items.answer: This page primarily describes the independent sales partnership. Other career paths are covered on the general careers page.

items.question: How does compensation work?
items.answer: The specific model depends on the role and collaboration and is explained transparently before any decision.

items.question: Which area would I cover?
items.answer: The focus is Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, Erlangen, and the metropolitan region. A sensible territory is agreed together.

cta.title: Does your working style fit ours?
cta.text: Tell us briefly where you are and how you approach real-estate sales. We will get back to you for an open introductory conversation.

metadata.title: Property guides & knowledge
metadata.description: Guides for property sales, buying, valuation, locations, and agent careers — structured clearly by Immonation.

KnowledgeHub.title: Answers for your next property decision.
KnowledgeHub.lede: From an initial sales plan to local context: find guides, FAQs, regional orientation, and reviewed resources in one place.
KnowledgeHub.answer: The Immonation knowledge hub brings together content for owners, buyers, and applicants. Topic gateways lead to detailed guides, practical pages, and — once reviewed — relevant downloads.

categories.title: Go straight to the right answer

items.title: Selling property
items.text: Guides for houses, apartments, land, and apartment buildings.

items.title: Property valuation
items.text: Value factors, process, and the documents needed for a reliable assessment.

items.title: Buying property
items.text: Listings, search requests, financing, and the route to a suitable property.

items.title: Region & micro-location
items.text: Evergreen orientation for Zirndorf, Nuremberg, Fürth, and Erlangen.

items.title: Agent career
items.text: Role, collaboration, and expectations for real-estate agents at Immonation.

items.title: Downloads & templates
items.text: Reviewed documents are connected to the guides where they are most useful.

note.title: Editorial note
note.text: Our content prepares decisions but does not replace a review of the property, records, and personal objective. We publish market or price claims only with a reliable source and update date.

articles.title: Latest articles
articles.count: {count, plural, =0 {No articles} one {# article} other {# articles}}

items.question: Where can I find information for my property type?
items.answer: The selling section contains dedicated guides for houses, apartments, land, and apartment buildings.

items.question: Do the location pages include current property prices?
items.answer: No. Without approved market data we do not publish supposedly current square-metre prices. The pages explain durable local factors instead.

items.question: Can I download checklists directly?
items.answer: Downloads are linked only after content, rights, accessibility, and currency are reviewed. The downloads area shows the current status.

items.question: Does a guide replace personal advice?
items.answer: No. Guides support preparation; pricing, strategy, and legally relevant individual questions require a property-specific review.

ReferenceDetailPage.prototypeNote: The figures come from the supplied reference material and are approved for this prototype. Evidence and consent remain required before public release.

cta.title: What could your property achieve?
cta.text: A strong sales strategy starts with a realistic understanding of the property, location, and audience.

metadata.title: Reference properties in Nuremberg, Fürth & region
metadata.description: Explore 15 Immonation reference properties from Nuremberg, Fürth, Erlangen, Zirndorf, and the region, with real property photography and client interviews.

ReferencesPage.title: Properties we have had the privilege to support
ReferencesPage.lede: From apartments to multi-family buildings, this selection presents real properties from our region and the range of homes and investments Immonation presents professionally and supports personally.

proof.title: Selected properties from the documented reference library
proof.text: We intentionally show only verifiable property types, locations, and approved images. Marketing periods, enquiry figures, and sale results are added only after documented approval.

gallery.title: As individual as the people behind them
gallery.text: Every property needs its own positioning. This selection ranges from apartments and detached homes to investment and commercial properties across the metropolitan region.

tour.title: Experience the space before the on-site appointment
tour.text: Virtual tours give prospective buyers a realistic first impression and help prepare viewings with greater focus. Discover how we present properties digitally.
tour.imageAlt: Bright garden apartment illustrating Immonation property presentation

cta.title: Your property could be the next success story
cta.text: We assess value, audience, and the right marketing route personally, without obligation and with a clear next step.
